bird.name: Senegal eremomela
bird.summary: The Senegal eremomela (Eremomela pusilla) is a member of the African warbler family, the Cisticolidae. It occurs in the savannas of western…

locations.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
locations.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲（英語：Sub-Saharan Africa）指撒哈拉沙漠以南的非洲地區，也稱黑非洲（Negro Africa）。自然地理上與衣索比亞界高度重疊。政治上，包括了所有或部分领土位于撒哈拉沙漠以南的国家（苏丹除外，尽管位于撒哈拉…

locations.name: 科特迪瓦
locations.summary: 科特迪瓦共和國（法語：République de Côte d'Ivoire），通稱科特迪瓦（Côte d'Ivoire），是西非國家，東接迦納，南臨几内亚湾，西及利比里亚和几内亚，北鄰馬利、布基纳法索。象牙海岸的首都是亚穆苏克罗，而最大…

relations.subject: Senegal eremomela
relations.evidence: It occurs in the savannas of western Sub-Saharan Africa

relations.subject: Senegal eremomela
relations.evidence: It breeds in the first half of the year in the west, although egg laying has been recorded as late as October in the Ivory Coast

relations.subject: Senegal eremomela
relations.evidence: The Senegal eremomela occurs in small parties which actively forage in wooded savanna, cultivated areas and orchards
